title: Monroe Doctrine
description: A Wikisource source card for the Monroe Doctrine and U.S. foreign policy history.

pages.text: The Monroe Doctrine is a primary source for studying U.S. foreign policy, empire, the Americas, and nineteenth-century geopolitics.
Use this source with maps and context so students can analyze policy language, power, and long-term interpretations.
Wikisource hosts public-domain and freely licensed texts. Check the linked work page for its specific license and source notes before assigning or mirroring.
